title: SIDISH Example Dataset
author: Jolasun, Yasmin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset provides example input files for running SIDISH, a deep learning–based framework for integrating single-cell, bulk RNA sequencing, and spatial transcriptomics data to identify High-Risk cell subpopulations and associated biomarkers. 
 For detailed instructions on how to use this dataset with SIDISH, please refer to the documentation available in the GitHub repository:  https://github.com/mcgilldinglab/SIDISH
steps_raw:
This dataset provides example input files for running SIDISH, a deep learning–based framework for integrating single-cell, bulk RNA sequencing, and spatial transcriptomics data to identify High-Risk cell subpopulations and associated biomarkers. 
 For detailed instructions on how to use this dataset with SIDISH, please refer to the documentation available in the GitHub repository:  https://github.com/mcgilldinglab/SIDISH
